input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.2.4
            TITLE: teams that submit one or more design documents which do not represent a serious effort to

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.2.4: Teams that submit one or more Design Documents which do not represent a serious effort to
S.4.2.4 Teams that submit one or more Design Documents which do not represent a serious effort to 
comply with the requirements may be excluded from the Design Event or be awarded a lower 
score.

final_answer: rule S.4.2.4: Teams that submit one or more Design Documents which do not represent a serious effort to comply with the requirements may be excluded from the Design Event or be awarded a lower score.
